extDescription.message: Export WhatsApp Web chats, contacts and messages (CSV/XLSX/VCard). AI summaries and reply suggestions, local or cloud.

consentBodyP1.message: This extension runs locally only — the data you export is never sent to any server. However, you are responsible for GDPR / CCPA / applicable law compliance when handling exported data (phone numbers, names, group members, etc.).

consentCheckLabel.message: I will only use this tool for personal data I am legally permitted to process.

statusNoTab.message: No WhatsApp Web tab found. Please open https://web.whatsapp.com.

statusContentUnreachable.message: Cannot reach the content script. Refresh the page and try again.

statusHealthNoReply.message: Health probe didn't respond. WhatsApp Web may not be ready.

reasonNotYetProbed.message: Module scan still running… wait a few seconds and click Refresh.

reasonInProgress.message: Modules loading… wait a bit longer for missing ones.

reasonInterceptionNotInstalled.message: Extension loaded too late: WhatsApp module system was not captured. Refresh the page.

reasonNoModulesCaptured.message: No modules captured. Refresh the page and sign in with QR.

reasonRequireMissing.message: WhatsApp Web module-access function not found. The WA Web version may be incompatible.

reasonModulesNotFound.message: Modules scanned but target shapes not found. Waiting for an extension update.

reasonPartialModules.message: Some modules were not found. Some features may be limited.

reasonWebpackMissing.message: WhatsApp Web seems unloaded. Refresh the page and sign in with QR.

reasonRequireNotCaptured.message: Module loader not captured. Refresh the page.

reasonTimeout.message: WhatsApp Web isn't ready yet. Refresh the page and sign in with QR.

messagesInfo.message: Extracts messages still kept in WhatsApp Web's memory. For older messages, open each chat and scroll up, then press Extract. Privacy: message content is processed locally, not sent to any server.

messagesNoteLowContext.message: ⚠️ For $1$% of chats only the last message could be retrieved (WA Web's memory has nothing older).

messagesNoteScrollUp.message: For better AI output, open the chat in WA Web and **scroll up** (loads older messages), then click "Re-extract".

messagesNoteOkContext.message: Decent context, but for better AI results open chats in WA Web, scroll up, then Re-extract.

messagesNoteFallback.message: For older messages, open each chat and scroll up, then click "Re-extract".

aiApiKeySaved.message: •••• stored (type a new one and click Save)

aiHelpLinkAnthropicKey.message: How do I get a key?

aiProviderHelpOllama.message: Ollama (recommended, free): download from ollama.com, install a model with ollama pull llama3.2, then run OLLAMA_ORIGINS=chrome-extension://* ollama serve (so the extension can connect).

aiProviderHelpOllamaFull.message: Ollama (free, local): download, install a model with ollama pull aya-expanse:8b, then run OLLAMA_ORIGINS=chrome-extension://* ollama serve (CORS allowance). Data stays on your machine, $0.

aiProviderHelpOpenAiCompat.message: LM Studio / llama.cpp (free, local): in LM Studio download a model and start the "Local Server" (default port 1234). For llama.cpp use the llama-server command.

aiProviderHelpAnthropic.message: Anthropic Claude: get an API key at console.anthropic.com. Typical price: Haiku 4.5 ~$0.001/chat, Sonnet 4.6 ~$0.01. Messages go to Anthropic; cost goes to your account.

aiProviderHelpOpenAi.message: OpenAI ChatGPT: get an API key at platform.openai.com. Typical price: gpt-4o-mini ~$0.0002/chat, gpt-4o ~$0.005. Messages go to OpenAI.

aiProviderHelpGemini.message: Google Gemini: get a free API key at aistudio.google.com. Gemini 2.0 Flash gives 1500 free requests per day. Messages go to Google.

aiProviderHelpGroq.message: Groq (very fast): get a free API key at console.groq.com. Runs open-weights models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen 2.5) at ~500 tokens/sec. Generous free tier.

aiInfoAnthropicSummary.message: Anthropic Claude · data goes to Anthropic · with your API key

aiInfoAnthropicDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to api.anthropic.com. The API key is stored on this device only; no relay server. Cost is billed to your Anthropic account.

aiInfoOpenAiSummary.message: OpenAI ChatGPT · data goes to OpenAI · with your API key

aiInfoOpenAiDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to api.openai.com. The API key is stored on this device only. Cost is billed to your OpenAI account.

aiInfoGeminiSummary.message: Google Gemini · data goes to Google · free tier available

aiInfoGeminiDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to Google AI Studio. Free tier: 1500 requests/day (Gemini 2.0 Flash). Key stored on this device.

aiInfoGroqSummary.message: Groq · data goes to Groq · free tier · very fast

aiInfoGroqDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to api.groq.com. Runs open-weights models (Llama 3.3 70B, Qwen, DeepSeek) on cloud hardware — ~500 tokens/sec. Generous free tier.

aiInfoOllamaSummary.message: Local Ollama · $0 · data stays on your computer

aiInfoOllamaDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to the local Ollama server ($1$). Messages never leave your computer.

aiInfoLocalLlmSummary.message: Local LLM · $0 · data stays on your computer

aiInfoLocalLlmDetail.message: Requests go directly from your browser to the local server ($1$). Messages never leave your computer.

aiActionSummarizeBody.message: First go to the Messages tab and extract messages for the chat. Then come back here, pick the chat, and produce a Summary or a Suggestion.

aiActionWhatIsCount.message: What does "(X messages)" mean in parentheses?

aiActionCountExplain.message: This number shows only the messages you extracted in the Messages tab — NOT the chat's full history. WhatsApp Web only keeps the last 1–50 messages per chat in RAM. For more, set Messages → "Earlier-message load rounds" to 5+ and re-extract. Chats marked (⚠️ low data / weak voice) may produce poor AI output.

aiChatSelectNoMessages.message: — Extract from the Messages tab first —

aiInstructionsPlaceholder.message: (optional) Chat-specific instructions — e.g. 'Use a short, friendly tone', 'Add date and place to replies', 'Focus on work agenda'

aiActionTriageBody.message: Sorts all your chats starting with the ones that need an urgent reply (you must have used "Extract" in the Chats tab).

suggestionFeedbackPlaceholder.message: What should change? (e.g. 'shorter', 'more formal', 'rephrase the question')

triageNoChatsAlert.message: First click 'Extract' in the Chats tab.

triageBadgeWarnTitle.message: AI did not produce a verifiable rationale for this row

triageWarnUnmatched.message: This name didn't match any input chat — AI may have hallucinated

aiModelInfoCustom.message:
$1$custom
No detailed info for this model; install with: ollama pull $2$

lowMessagesConfirm.message:
⚠️ Not enough message history for this chat ($1$ messages, yours: $2$).

AI needs at least 5+ messages to learn your voice and the chat context. With insufficient context the model produces generic / assumption-based suggestions.

Suggested: open the Messages tab, set "Earlier-message load rounds" to 5+ for this chat, and re-extract.

Continue anyway?

autoreplyHowBody.message: The default mode is Draft: AI produces a reply, it's sent only after you approve. For automatic sending, enable each chat individually; mind the rate limit and quiet hours.

autoreplyMasterLabel.message: Master switch — start listening for new messages

autoreplyChatSelectPlaceholderInit.message: — Extract chats from the Chats tab first —

autoreplyChatSelectPlaceholderEmpty.message: — Extract chats from the Chats tab first —

autoreplyInstructionsPlaceholder.message: (optional) Chat-specific instructions — e.g. 'Confirm meeting suggestions', 'Be short and professional', 'Politely defer when asked for details'

autoreplyPendingEmpty.message: No drafts yet. New incoming messages will appear here.

groupsHowBody.message: For members saved in your phone, name and phone are returned. Members shown as +15… are NOT in your phone book; WA Web only shares their phone number.

groupsNoteNoMembers.message: Member list unavailable (GroupMetadata module may not be ready — try Refresh / re-scan QR).

labelsIncludeSystemLabel.message: Show system filters too (Unread, Favorites, Groups…)

labelsNoteEmptyBusiness.message: No user labels found in this account — only WA's system filters are listed. User labels are a WhatsApp Business feature; they cannot be created on a regular WhatsApp account.

labelsNoteEmpty.message: No labels found. Tick the box above to also show system filters.

labelsExportEmptyUser.message: No user labels found. To include system filters, tick "Show system filters too".

exportEmpty.message: No records pass the filter. Try toggling "Include unsaved contacts".

exportXlsxNoData.message: Extract data in at least one tab first.

exportXlsxConfirm.message:
The XLSX file WILL include these sheets:
  ✓ $1$

Not extracted — WILL NOT be included:
  ✗ $2$

If you want all sheets, click Cancel and run "Extract" in the missing tabs first.

Continue with current sheets?

vcardHelpBody.message: On Windows, New Outlook doesn't support .vcf import. Try one of these:

vcardHelpItem1.message: Google Contacts → "Import" → pick the file

vcardHelpItem3.message: Android / iPhone: open the file on your phone → add to contacts

disclaimerText.message: GDPR / CCPA / applicable law compliance is the user's responsibility. Privacy notice

freeMsgLimitConfirm.message:
On the Free plan, at most $1$ messages per chat can be extracted.

Your selection of $2$ → will be capped to $3$.

For a higher limit, activate your license under the Pro tab.

Continue?

licenseFeature1.message: ✨ AI Assistant (summaries, reply suggestions, chat triage — 6 providers)

licenseDeactivateConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate Pro on this device? You can re-activate the same key later.

licenseActivateNote.message: Your key arrives by email after a Gumroad purchase. Activation stores the key on this device; verification automatically renews about once a week.

licenseProductIdMissingError.message: Activation service is not configured yet. Please try again later.

licenseInvalidError.message: Invalid license key. Please check the key in your Gumroad email.

licenseNetworkError.message: Network error: check your internet connection.

licenseServerError.message: Gumroad server error. Try again in a few minutes.

licenseProPromptBody.message: Pro unlocks the AI Assistant, Auto-Reply, and an extended message limit.
